name: Reducto
one_liner: Agentic document platform providing layout-aware OCR, parsing, extraction, splitting, and editing APIs that turn complex real-world documents into LLM-ready structured output.
access_notes: Free account can be created at studio.reducto.ai; users generate an API key from the API Keys section of the dashboard. Docs confirm a free account exists though exact usage/credit limits are not stated.
api_notes: REST API (OpenAPI 3.1) with a handful of core operations: Parse (sync/async), Extract, Split, and Edit. Bearer-token auth ('SkippableHTTPBearer'). Official SDKs for Python (3.8+), Node.js, and Go, plus direct cURL/HTTP.
mcp_notes: Reducto ships an official MCP server (github.com/reductoai/mcp-server-reducto, published on PyPI as mcp-server-reducto). Install via 'claude mcp add reducto -- uvx mcp-server-reducto'. Exposes tools for uploading, parsing, extracting, splitting, and editing/classifying documents.
main_blocker: None significant — public REST API with self-serve free account and API keys. Exact free-tier limits are unspecified.

evidence.claim: Free account at studio.reducto.ai; API key created from API Keys sidebar section; SDKs for Python, Node.js, Go plus cURL
POST /parse endpoint with SyncParseConfig and AsyncParseConfig; SkippableHTTPBearer auth; async webhook support (Svix or direct HTTP POST) returning job_id
Core operations are Parse, Split, Extract, and Edit for scalable AI document workflows
Official MCP server repo mcp-server-reducto maintained by Reducto on GitHub

open_questions: Exact free-tier usage limits/credits and whether a paid plan is required beyond a certain volume; pricing model for high-volume async processing.
